$comment: Per-project deepwiki + exa MCP servers. context7/deepwiki/exa are OFF on the global Claude Code surface (modules/home/claude.nix → claudeDisableGlobalMcpPlugins; see docs/adr/0003-scope-code-context-mcp-per-project.md). To opt a project in: copy this file to that project's repo root as `.mcp.json`, drop these `$`-prefixed comment keys, then approve the servers when Claude Code prompts on first run (or list their names under `enabledMcpjsonServers` in the project's .claude/settings.json). deepwiki is keyless; exa reads EXA_API_KEY from your environment via ${EXA_API_KEY} expansion — export it (e.g. in your shell) before use.
